lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਅੰਧੀ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਲੇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: eik roveh pireh vichhuneea andhee na jaanai pir hai naale |4|2|
lines.english: Some weep and wail, separated from their Husband Lord; the blind ones do not know that their Husband is with them. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਪਿਰੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak saa dhan milai milaaee pir antar sadaa samaale |
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride is united in Union; she cherishes her Beloved Husband forever, deep within herself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵਹਿ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚੜਾ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: roveh pireh vichhuneea mai pir sacharraa hai sadaa naale |
lines.english: Those who are separated from their Beloved Husband Lord weep and wail, but my True Husband Lord is always with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa naam samaale satigur hai naale satigur sev sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: They dwell constantly upon the Naam, and the True Guru is with them; they serve the True Guru, and so obtain peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਚਲਣੁ ਸਹੀ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee chalan sahee jaaniaa satigur seveh naam samaale |
lines.english: Those who know that they must depart, serve the True Guru, and dwell upon the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੀ ਨਾਈ ਵੇਖੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib sachee naaee vekhai nadar nihaale |
lines.english: True is the Lord and Master, and True is His Name; bestowing His Gracious Glance, one is enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਕਾਲੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabade kaal maar sach ur dhaar fir aavan jaan na hoeaa |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, they kill death, and enshrine the True Lord within their hearts; they shall not have to come and go again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵਹਿ ਪਿਰਹੁ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚੜਾ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: roveh pirahu vichhuneea mai pir sacharraa hai sadaa naale |1|
lines.english: Those who are separated from their Beloved Husband Lord weep and wail, but my True Husband Lord is always with me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਭ ਦੂ ਊਚਾ ਹੈ ਕਿਵ ਮਿਲਾਂ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa saahib sabh doo aoochaa hai kiv milaan preetam piaare |
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, is the highest of all; how can I meet my Dear Beloved?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਤਾਂ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur melee taan sehaj milee pir raakhiaa ur dhaare |
lines.english: When the True Guru united me, then I was naturally united with my Husband Lord, and now, I keep Him clasped to my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਕਾ ਕਚਾ ਚੋਲਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਪੈਧੈ ਪਗੁ ਖਿਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh kaa kachaa cholaa tith paidhai pag khisai |
lines.english: The cloak of Maya's love is false; wearing it, one slips and loses his footing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ਨੇਹੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਿਰੁ ਦਿਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa ur dhaare nehu naal piaare satigur te pir disai |
lines.english: I constantly, lovingly cherish my Beloved within my heart; through the True Guru, I see my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਸਚਾ ਚੋਲਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਪੈਧੈ ਤਿਖਾ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: pir rang raataa so sachaa cholaa tith paidhai tikhaa nivaare |
lines.english: That cloak is true, which is dyed in the color of the Love of my Beloved; wearing it, my inner thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਭ ਦੂ ਊਚਾ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਮਿਲਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa saahib sabh doo aoochaa hai kiau milaa preetam piaare |2|
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, is the highest of all; how can I meet my Dear Beloved? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹੋਰ ਭੂਲੀ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mai prabh sach pachhaaniaa hor bhoolee avaganiaare |
lines.english: I have realized my True Lord God, while the other worthless ones have gone astray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਸਦਾ ਰਾਵੇ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਚੜੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mai sadaa raave pir aapanaa sacharrai sabad veechaare |
lines.english: I dwell constantly upon my Beloved Husband Lord, and reflect upon the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਨਾਰੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad veechaare rang raatee naare mil satigur preetam paaeaa |
lines.english: The bride reflects upon the True Shabad, and is imbued with His Love; she meets with the True Guru, and finds her Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੰਉ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਤਾਂ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: apane gur knau tan man deejai taan man bheejai trisanaa dookh nivaare |
lines.english: Surrender body and soul to your Guru, and then you shall become happy; your thirst and pain shall be taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਾਤੀ ਗਇਆ ਦੁਸਮਨੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar rang raatee sahaje maatee geaa dusaman dookh sabaaeaa |
lines.english: Deep within, she is imbued with His Love, and intoxicated with delight; her enemies and sufferings are all taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹੋਰ ਭੂਲੀ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mai pir sach pachhaaniaa hor bhoolee avaganiaare |3|
lines.english: I have realized my True Lord God, while the other worthless ones have gone astray. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜੈ ਆਪਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: sacharrai aap jagat upaaeaa gur bin ghor andhaaro |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself created the world; without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aap milaae aap milai aape dee piaaro |
lines.english: He Himself unites, and causes us to unite with Him; He Himself blesses us with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਸਹਜਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape dee piaaro sehaj vaapaaro guramukh janam savaare |
lines.english: He Himself blesses us with His Love, and deals in celestial peace; the life of the Gurmukh is reformed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: dhan jag meh aaeaa aap gavaaeaa dar saachai sachiaaro |
lines.english: Blessed is his coming into the world; he banishes his self-conceit, and is acclaimed as true in the Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨਿ ਰਤਨਿ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਹੋਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: giaan ratan ghatt chaanan hoaa naanak naam piaaro |
lines.english: The light of the jewel of spiritual wisdom shines within his heart, O Nanak, and he loves the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜੈ ਆਪਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰੋ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: sacharrai aap jagat upaaeaa gur bin ghor andhaaro |4|3|
lines.english: The True Lord Himself created the world; without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਜਜਰੀ ਹੈ ਇਸ ਨੋ ਜਰੁ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu sareer jajaree hai is no jar pahuchai aae |
lines.english: This body is frail; old age is overtaking it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹੋਰੁ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare hor mar jamai aavai jaae |
lines.english: Those who are protected by the Guru are saved, while others die, to be reincarnated; they continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hor mar jameh aaveh jaaveh ant ge pachhutaaveh bin naavai sukh na hoee |
lines.english: Others die, to be reincarnated; they continue coming and going, and in the end, they depart regretfully. Without the Name, there is no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਨਾ ਤਿਥੈ ਭੈਣ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jam pur ghor andhaar mahaa gubaar naa tithai bhain na bhaaee |
lines.english: In the City of Death, there is pitch darkness, and huge clouds of dust; neither sister nor brother is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਹੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aithai kamaavai so fal paavai manamukh hai pat khoee |
lines.english: As one acts here, so does he obtain his rewards; the self-willed manmukh loses his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਜਜਰੀ ਹੈ ਇਸ ਨੋ ਜਰੁ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eihu sareer jajaree hai is no jar pahuchai aaee |1|
lines.english: This body is frail; old age is overtaking it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਤਾਂ ਥੀਐ ਜਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kanchan taan theeai jaan satigur le milaae |
lines.english: The body becomes like gold, when the True Guru unites one with Himself.
